title: Body-Rigs

'''Body-Rigs''' was a sub-set of [[Kenner Products|Kenner's]] [[1985]] [[Star Wars: The Power of the Force (1985 toy line)|''Star Wars: The Power of the Force'']] toy line. Originally known as '''Single Body Transport Vehicles'''<ref name="Kenner catalog">{{WebCite|url=https://issuu.com/orangeslime/docs/kenner_85|text=Kenner 1985 Pre-Toy Fair Catalog|work=Issuu.com|archivedate=20230228133006}}</ref>, the small, one-man vehicles were even smaller than the [[Mini-Rigs]] toys. Two of the vehicles appeared in [[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO|''Star Wars: Droids'']]: the [[Imperial Sniper]] and the [[One-Man Sand Skimmer]]. In Europe, these vehicles were sold in a closed box, while Kenner released them in the US on a blister card.<ref name="Offscreen">{{SW|url=news/offscreen-but-not-forgotten-mini-rigs-body-rigs-and-other-kenner-vehicles|text=Offscreen, but Not Forgotten: Mini-Rigs, Body-Rigs, and Other Kenner Vehicles|int=Offscreen, but Not Forgotten: Mini-Rigs, Body-Rigs, and Other Kenner Vehicles|nolive=1}}</ref>
